fix(terminal): forward docker_forward_env and docker_env to container_config The container_config builder in terminal_tool.py was missing docker_forward_env and docker_env keys, causing config.yaml's docker_forward_env setting to be silently ignored. Environment variables listed in docker_forward_env were never injected into Docker containers. This fix adds both keys to the container_config dict so they are properly passed to _create_environment().
